description:
The previous demon king, who is known to be scary, comes to visit. Is he immune to Doux`s charms?
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Sendai Maou wa Kowasugiru!! / Sendai Maou ga Jiji Baka Sugiru!!
The Previous Demon King Is Too Scary!! / The Previous Demon King Is Too Much of a Doting Grandpa!!
先代魔王が怖すぎる!! / 先代魔王がジジバカすぎる!!
